title: Baker Ross AG671 Stretchy Snakes (Pack of 8)
features: Children will love bending these snakes into all sorts of poses. Pull them, ping them, watch them go. These super stretchy reptiles are en route to fun.
Little ones will be bowled over by these brightly colored slithering snakes. You won't find any fun sponges round here
Give these slithering snakes a real stretch. Perfect party bag filler.
Length - approx 20 cm (8 inches) for each snake. Suitable for children aged 3+.

Made by experts: Baker Ross has been designing and providing the very best art and craft supplies, and toys to schools, groups and parents for over 40 years. All products conform to General Product Safety Regulations, and state age recommendation where applicable.
description: Product Description Sssss.Super stretchy snakes that will always 'slither' Back to their original shape. It is still a family-owned and family-run business, with innovative ideas that have LED them to become one of the leading suppliers of arts and crafts for girls and boys in the UK.
